ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Potatoes (69%), Sunflower Oil and/or Canola Oil (25%), Sticky BBQ Ribs Flavoured Seasoning (6%) [Fructose, Vegetable Powders (Tomatoes, Onion, Garlic), Salt, Natural Flavour, Sugar, Maltodextrin (Maize), Spices (Paprika, Chilli, Black Pepper, Allspice), Yeast Extract (Milk), Inactive Dry Yeast, Carob Powder]. CONTAINS MILK. MAY CONTAIN SOY.
